title.display: Washington Square Prisoners of War Memorial
title.list: Washington Square Prisoners of War Memorial

inscription: In memory of the many American soldiers, who, during the War for Independence, died prisoners of war in the jails of Philadlelphia, and were buried in this ground during the years 1777 and 1778. Erected by Quaker City Chapter Daughters of the American Revolution, October 1900
